name: 4H asymmetric exit repair | SMA700 | buffer 3.0% | p3/1
pattern_source: False exits and late exits showed deterioration before the 3/3 exit confirmed.
logic: Keep normal threshold entry, but exit on first confirmed threshold loss to reduce give-back.

name: 4H anti-whipsaw cooldown | SMA750 | buffer 3.0% | p2/1
pattern_source: Losses clustered after repeated failed threshold attempts.
logic: Require slope not clearly negative and skip entries after an elevated failed-attempt count.

name: 4H slope recent-high quality | SMA700 | buffer 3.0% | p2/1
pattern_source: Breakouts with positive SMA slope and recent-high confirmation had better follow-through.
logic: Long threshold only when SMA slope is positive, close breaks prior high, and close is in the upper candle half.

name: 4H compression quality breakout | SMA750 | buffer 2.5% | p1/1
pattern_source: Best baseline trades came after non-expanded volatility and decisive candles.
logic: Long threshold only after relative range compression, a prior-high break, body quality, and close near the high.
